name: Joblytics P7E Launch QA
notes: Soft launch means the product can be shared with a small trusted audience for validation.
Stripe checkout is prepared but should remain inactive until real Stripe products, prices, webhook secret, and environment variables are configured.
Continue monitoring browser console, Supabase errors, Vercel logs, and the reliability dashboard during testing.
Do not run paid acquisition until Google Safe Browsing/Search Console status is confirmed clean.
